meta.note: subscription auth; codex reports tokens, not USD

A.missing: Profuse or exceptional degree is missing; the AST carries only ordinary abundance.
A.reason: “There is much/many X” gives the right abundance genus but does not distinguish wealth from mere plenty.

B.missing: Abundance of X is replaced by abundance of kinds of X.
B.reason: The AST expresses extensive variety rather than a profuse amount of the referenced thing.

C.missing: Profuse abundance is replaced by a malformed classification of X as a kind of many very big things.
C.reason: It neither asserts that much X exists nor coherently renders abundance as a quality.

D.missing: Profuse abundance is replaced by localized quantity plus an unwarranted denial of variety elsewhere.
D.reason: The spatial concentration and exclusion clauses are not part of this sense of wealth.

E.missing: Profuse abundance is not compositionally predicated; an unattached MORE and an unwarranted public judgment are carried instead.
E.reason: Although it mentions much X, the attempted intensification is unanchored and the added belief about X being a big kind is erroneous.
